Your one-stop shop for home and garden essentials

Step into the world of vidaXL, where every corner of your home and garden can be enhanced by our diverse range of products. From chic furniture for your home to essential garden tools that empower your green thumb, we’ve got it all. At vidaXL, redecorating your home, sprucing up your garden or finding that ideal gift is easy and affordable.

Read more Read less

Dive into our online shop and discover how to achieve the jackpot feeling without stretching your budget. We aim to make all products accessible to everyone by keeping our prices low.

Who are we at vidaXL?

At vidaXL, we are a dynamic international online retailer driven by the philosophy that there is always room for improvement and affordability. ‘Expect more’ isn’t just our slogan — it’s a promise. We understand the value of your money and constantly strive to enhance our product range and bring you competitively priced items.

Our own vidaXL brand offers a unique range of products that are either scarce or substantially more expensive elsewhere. Embracing the challenge, our other motto ‘Impossible? Think again’ reflects our commitment to surpassing your expectations every time.

Stylish yet affordable indoor and outdoor furniture

Home is where the heart is, and at vidaXL, we make sure it looks the part without breaking the bank. We’re always on the pulse of the latest trends in home decor and furniture design, ensuring that our collections are not only up to date but also accessible. 

Whether you’re after inspiration or practical advice, our buying guides and highlighted home interior styles are designed to guide you to the ideal additions to your home. Check out our deals page for daily and weekly specials that offer great value on a range of items.

A vast home assortment awaits

Our online shop offers an incredible variety of products to suit all your needs. Whether you're redecorating your home, buying gifts or setting up a home gym, you'll find everything you need in one place.

We happily cater to every aspect of your home life — from stylish furnishings to practical gadgets and even pet supplies for your furry family members.

Transform your garden into a haven

Transform your garden into a haven with our wide selection of outdoor essentials. From cosy seating areas to decorative accents, discover how easy it is to enhance your garden and make it a retreat for relaxation and enjoyment. And for fitness enthusiasts, our outdoor fitness equipment means you can get your workout in without stepping away from the beauty of your garden. 

Yes, with everything from parasols to sport, our garden range is designed to enhance and equip your outdoor spaces for endless enjoyment. Explore our range today and start your garden transformation.

Effortless online shopping

At vidaXL, convenience is key. Enjoy free delivery on all products — from plush sofas to essential sporting goods, and expect your items within just a few days. We ensure a swift and seamless delivery process so you can start enjoying your new additions without delay.

Pay how you like

Online shopping is all about convenience and flexibility. Choose your preferred payment method, whether it’s credit card, bank transfer or PayPal, and we’ll handle the rest, ensuring your items arrive swiftly at your doorstep.

Join the club and score rewards

Become a vidaXL+ member and turn your shopping into savings. With every purchase, you’ll rack up points that you can swap for discounts on future buys. Get ready to shop smarter and make every penny count. Simply sign up and start with 4 welcome points to get the ball rolling. Whether you're creating a new account or already a part of the vidaXL family, just select ‘opt-in’ in your account settings to join the fun. 

In need of support?

Our comprehensive help centre has many frequently asked questions covering delivery, shipping, product details and much more.
For a more tailored assistance experience during your purchase journey, don't hesitate to contact our experienced customer service team. Our devoted professionals are ready to tackle any queries you may have, be they general questions or specific product-related inquiries.

Contact us!

© 2008-2026 vidaXL www.vidaxl.co.uk is a website of vidaXL Marketplace LTD.
Reject all cookies

By accepting all our cookies you agree that vidaXL places cookies to improve the website experience, for example with more relevant products and suggestions. vidaXL also has several partners that require data to be sent to them to confirm sales, or provide targeted advertisements. For more information see our privacy and cookie statement.

Want to know more?

View our Privacy and Cookie statement.

Personal cookie settings

Personalise settings Save settings
By clicking “Accept All Cookies”, you agree to the storing of cookies on your device to enhance site navigation, analyse site usage, assist in our marketing efforts, and deliver personalized ads. Privacy Policy and Cookie Statement

Privacy Preference Centre

When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences, or your device, and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect. The information does not usually identify you directly, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to learn more and change our default settings. Blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
Privacy Policy and Cookie Statement

Manage Consent Preferences

Strictly Necessary Cookies

Always Active

These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.

Functional Cookies

These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third-party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.

Performance Cookies

These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources, so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies, we will not know when you have visited our site.

Targeting Cookies

These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

Social Media Cookies

These cookies are set by a range of social media services that we have added to the site to enable you to share our content with your friends and networks. They are capable of tracking your browser across other sites and building up a profile of your interests. This may impact the content and messages you see on other websites you visit. If you do not allow these cookies you may not be able to use or see these sharing tools.

Cookie List
